text: Excited to be presenting our work on algorithmic nudges at ICA 2025 in Denver. Come find us at panel 23B — would love to chat about this project!
Our paper on search behavior and vaccination uptake won the Best Student Paper award at AoIR 2025. Huge thanks to my co-authors Riley and Dana.
New preprint posted: "When Corrections Backfire" — examining how platform labeling interventions interact with audience trust. Feedback very welcome!
Joined the Cornell Information Science department as a Ph.D. student. Very excited for the year ahead.
